text:
A girl wants chocolate for candy.

One day she eats brownies. A lovely brownie.



She likes big cocoa beans.



But thinks cookies look small.

So goes online. Likes cream cheese.



She likes lots. Chocolate chips cookies?



She likes those.



Once thinks cookies ice cream.



So gets milkshake.



Likes chocolate.


Favorite candy.





Just chocolate.



So loves.


There isn photo.
